data.title: Capitolis achieves record-breaking performance in 2025 in portfolio optimization business across FX, Rates, and Credit products.
data.description: Capitolis, based in New York, has reported exceptional performance in 2025 in its portfolio optimization business, comprising FX, Rates, and Credit products. The company has achieved record-breaking results, indicating significant growth and success in its operations.

data.title: FreeWheel appoints Don Amboyer as GM of Strata, focusing on media management software, reporting to Mark McKee.
data.description: In New York today, FreeWheel, a prominent global technology platform for streaming advertising, named Don Amboyer as the new General Manager for Strata, the company's media management software. In this role, Amboyer will oversee Strata's operations, revenue, strategy, and product roadmap, reporting to FreeWheel General Manager Mark McKee. This move emphasizes FreeWheel's dedication to Strata by appointing a GM and solidifying it as a dedicated platform organization within the company.

data.title: Armis launches new partner program, Armis Select Partner Program, to expand global reach. Strengthen defenses with Armis Centrix™.
data.description: In San Francisco, Armis, a cybersecurity company, revealed the launch of the Armis Select Partner Program. This initiative signals a major advancement in Armis' dedication to its worldwide partner network. Through the program, Armis aims to expand the accessibility of Armis Centrix™, its Cyber Exposure Management Platform, to organizations on a global scale, enabling mutual customers to enhance their security operations and fortify defenses.

data.title: LibertyStream to move HQ to Texas, seeks shareholder approval in special meeting on March 31, 2026. $LIB.v #criticalminerals.
data.description: Dallas-based LibertyStream Infrastructure Partners Inc. (TSXV: LIB | OTCQB: VLTLF | FSE: I2D) has set March 31, 2026, as the date for a Special Meeting of Shareholders to discuss the proposed move of the company's headquarters to Dallas, Texas in the United States. The re-domiciliation plan aims to bring alignment to LibertyStream's corporate structure.

data.title: Global CEOs plan to increase enterprise AI investment despite concerns; new survey reports.
data.description: A recent white paper unveiled in Tokyo highlights the key challenges and opportunities facing CEOs in the realm of AI infrastructure optimization. The document outlines strategies for achieving efficient and sustainable AI frameworks.

data.title: OptConnect acquires DPL Wireless to enhance IoT innovations. The deal combines two tech companies for advanced connectivity solutions.
data.description: In Kaysville, Utah, OptConnect, a top company in managed wireless connectivity solutions, has recently acquired DPL Wireless, a Canadian company known for providing cellular connectivity and IoT device-intelligence solutions. Through this acquisition, OptConnect aims to enhance innovation in the IoT sector by introducing an advanced, AI-powered connectivity platform tailored for ATMs and other IoT applications. This strategic move brings together two reputable technology firms to deliver cutting-edge solutions.

data.title: QEP reports financial results for fiscal 2026: Nine-month & third-quarter results released, ending on Nov. 30, 2025.
data.description: In Boca Raton, Florida, on January 14, 2026, Q.E.P. CO., INC. (OTCQX: QEPC) disclosed its financial performance for the first nine months and third quarter of fiscal year 2026, concluding on November 30, 2025.

French Foreign Minister Barrot: Studying the possibility of sending Eutelsat terminals to Iran

data.title: High Roller Technologies and Crypto.com team up to tap into the $1 trillion prediction markets industry, aiming for growth.
data.description: A recently established alliance between a strategic partnership and Crypto.com will enable the operation of event-based Prediction Markets. The mature market in question is forecasted to surpass $1 trillion in annual trading volume.

data.title: United customers can preorder fresh meals on flights over 1,190 miles in North America and Caribbean on united.com.
data.description: United customers now have the option to buy a variety of food items including burgers, sandwiches, and snack boxes through united.com and the United mobile app. The United Economy® meal preorders are available for flights over 1,190 miles within North America and the Caribbean. This service was introduced on January 14, 2026, from Chicago.

data.title: First patients treated with GammaTile in BRIDGES Trial at Westchester Medical Center & Brown University Health for newly diagnosed glioblastoma, a complex tumor with <2-year average patient survival - American Brain Tumor Association.
data.description: Two medical centers, Westchester Medical Center and Brown University Health, have become the first to activate and enroll patients for a groundbreaking treatment. Glioblastoma, a highly complex tumor, poses a significant challenge with an average patient survival rate of less than two years, as reported by the American Brain Tumor Association.

data.title: SpyCloud launches supply chain solution to combat third-party identity threats, providing visibility into vendor identity exposures.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, in Austin, Texas, a new monitoring capability was introduced to provide enhanced visibility into vendor identity exposures. This advancement aims to shift enterprises and government agencies from traditional static risk scoring to actively safeguarding against real identity threats. SpyCloud, a prominent player in the identity protection field, announced this development, signifying a crucial step forward in tackling identity-related risks.

data.title: Otis expands Little Engineers STEM program globally to inspire innovators. Making strides in elevators and escalators.
data.description: FARMINGTON, Connecticut - On January 14, 2026, Otis, a global leader in elevator and escalator manufacturing, installation, and service, launched a hands-on learning program to motivate future innovators. Known as Little Engineers, the initiative seeks to inspire the younger generation. Otis, a company listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol OTIS, intends to foster creativity and interest in engineering among youth.

data.title: OpenAssets launches as parent brand to build open standard for assets. PITTSBURGH, Jan. 14, 2026, to establish standards for asset tokenization infrastructure.
data.description: OpenAssets, a company based in Pittsburgh, made an announcement on January 14, 2026, via PRNewswire, introducing itself as the parent brand of Pointsville. OpenAssets is focused on setting open standards for upcoming capital markets, aiming to become the reliable base for real-world asset tokenization infrastructure. This new venture by OpenAssets marks a significant step towards shaping the future of capital markets.

data.title: Trout CPA hires Daniel Pavlovic, CFA, as Director of Business Valuation to expand practice.
data.description: In Lancaster, Pennsylvania on January 14, 2026, Trout CPA introduced Daniel Pavlovic, CFA, as their new Director of Business Valuation. With a wealth of experience from a national firm, Pavlovic is set to enhance the team's valuation services and assist with intricate financial reporting. This move underscores the company's focus on expanding its capabilities in this area.

data.title: Filevine acquires Pincites to enhance Word-native functionality, redlining in LOIS. Acquisition announced on Jan. 14, 2026.
data.description: In a significant development on Jan. 14, 2026, Filevine announced the acquisition of Pincites. With this acquisition, Filevine enhances its offerings by integrating Word-native functionality and advanced drafting and redlining capabilities. By incorporating Pincites into its AI-Powered Legal Operating Intelligence System (LOIS), Filevine is poised to set new industry standards. This acquisition underscores Filevine's commitment to innovation and consolidation within the legal tech sector.

data.title: Cereno Scientific debuts first peer-reviewed publication on HDAC Inhibitor CS014, showing antithrombotic efficacy without bleeding risk, broad potential. (Word count: 23)
data.description: In Gothenburg, Sweden, on January 14, 2026, Cereno Scientific, a biotech company traded on NASDAQ First North under the ticker CRNO B, unveiled their groundbreaking efforts to improve and lengthen the lives of individuals affected by uncommon cardiovascular and pulmonary conditions. This announcement coincided with the release of their inaugural peer-reviewed study.

data.title: Microsoft chooses Eyelit Technologies for lab traceability and quality; Eyelit's MOM Solution Suite to support multiple labs globally.
data.description: In Holmdel, New Jersey, Eyelit Technologies revealed today that Microsoft has chosen its Manufacturing Operations Management (MOM) Solution Suite to enhance traceability and quality control in numerous labs worldwide. The solution, which includes Eyelit’s MES and QMS modules, aims to streamline semiconductor and specialty processing workflows on a large scale. This partnership signifies a significant step forward in optimizing planning, scheduling, and execution systems for manufacturers, showcasing Eyelit’s expertise in this area.
